Quick summary:

- CU-002: 9.1 kg × 0.12 mg/kg = 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min
- CU-003: 15.7 kg × 0.18 mg/kg = 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min

PK stability:
- From the current dosing config, nothing looks obviously off.
- CU-001 and CU-002 are noted as stable/improving.
- CU-003 is newly enrolled, so there’s less trend data.
- That said, I only reviewed the latest dosing config here — I did not review live PK model outputs or monitoring logs, so I can’t fully confirm runtime model stability from this alone.

If you want, I can also format this into a shorter email-ready version for Dr. Martinez.
